title.ko: 체적. 체적유량, 질량유량 또는 액위측정; 체적에 의한 계량
title.en: MEASURING VOLUME, VOLUME FLOW, MASS FLOW, OR LIQUID LEVEL; METERING BY VOLUME

definition.ko: 체적의 측정 G01F17/00, G01F19/00, G01F22/00 체적 유량의 측정 연속류에 있어서의 것; 불연속류에 있어서의 것; 유량의 비율에 의한 것 G01F1/00; G01F3/00; G01F5/00 다수의 측정범위를 가진 것 G01F7/00 다른 양과의 비교에 의한 것 G01F9/00 레벨 지시계 G01F23/00 체적에 의한 계량 G01F11/00, G01F13/00 세부, 부속물 G01F15/00 시험, 교정 G01F25/00

title.ko: 연속적인 흐름에서 유체가 계량기를 통과하여 유체 또는 유동성 고체 물질의 체적 유량 또는 질량 유량을 측정(체적 유량의 비율 측정 G01F5/00)
title.en: Measuring volume flow

title.ko: 연속적인 흐름에서 유체가 계량기를 통과하여 유체 또는 유동성 고체 물질의 체적 유량 또는 질량 유량을 측정(체적 유량의 비율 측정 G01F5/00)
title.en: Measuring the volume flow or mass flow of fluid or fluent solid material wherein the fluid passes through a meter in a continuous flow (measuring a proportion of the volume flow G01F0005000000)
wherein the flow is in an open channel
by using mechanical effects
using rotating vanes with tangential admission
with mechanical coupling to the indicating device
with magnetic or electromagnetic coupling to the indicating device
Adjusting, correcting, or compensating means therefor
using rotating vanes with axial admission
with mechanical coupling to the indicating device
with magnetic or electromagnetic coupling to the indicating device
Adjusting, correcting, or compensating means therefor
by detection of dynamic effects of the flow
by variable-area meters
with magnetic or electric coupling to the indicating device
of the valve type
by drag-force, e.g. vane type or impact flowmeter
for fluent solid material
using swirl flowmeters
Means for detecting quantities used as proxy variables for swirl
by measuring pressure or differential pressure
the pressure or differential pressure being created by the use of flow constriction
the pressure or differential pressure being measured by means of communicating tubes or reservoirs with movable fluid levels, e.g. by U-tubes
the pressure or differential pressure being measured by means of a movable element, e.g. diaphragm, piston, Bourdon tube or flexible capsule
Details of construction of the flow constriction devices
Orifices or nozzles
Venturi tubes
Pitot tubes
the pressure or differential pressure being created by a capillary element
Correcting or compensating means
by measuring the height of the fluid level due to the lifting power of the fluid flow
by means of chains, flexible bands, or wires introduced into, and moved by, the flow

title.ko: 전기적 또는 자기적인 효과를 사용하는 것(G01F 1/66이 우선)
title.en: by using electric or magnetic effects (G01F0001660000 takes precedence)
by electromagnetic flowmeters
Circuits therefor

title.ko: 유체 유량을 통과하는 전류의 측정에 의한 것; 유체 유량에 의해 생성된 전위의 측정에 의한 것, 예. 전기화학적, 접촉, 또는 마찰 효과에 의한 것 (G01F1/58이 우선)
title.en: by measuring electrical currents passing through the fluid flow; by measuring electrical potential generated by the fluid flow, e.g. by electrochemical, contact, or friction effects (G01F0001580000 takes precedence)
by measuring frequency, phase shift or propagation time of electromagnetic or other waves, e.g. using ultrasonic flowmeters
using light
by measuring Doppler frequency shift
Arrangements of transducers for ultrasonic flowmeters; Circuits for operating ultrasonic flowmeters
by using thermal effects
Structural arrangements; Mounting of elements, e.g. in relation to fluid flow
using a particular type of heating, cooling or sensing element
of resistive type
Thin-film arrangements
Circuits therefor, e.g. constant-current flow meters
Feedback or rebalancing circuits, e.g. self heated constant temperature flowmeters
by control of a separate heating or cooling element

title.ko: 유체 유량내에서 표시된 영역 또는 기존의 불균일성을 사용하는 것, 예. 유체 파라미터에서 통계적으로 발생하는 변동 (G01F1/76, G01F25/00이 우선)
title.en: using marked regions or existing inhomogeneities within the fluid stream, e.g. statistically occurring variations in a fluid parameter (G01F0001760000, G01F0025000000 take precedence)
Measuring the time taken to traverse a fixed distance
using acoustic detecting arrangements
using thermal detecting arrangements
using optical detecting arrangements
using electrically charged particles as tracers
using auto-correlation or cross-correlation detection means
using electron paramagnetic resonance [EPR] or nuclear magnetic resonance [NMR]
Devices for measuring pulsing fluid flows
Devices for measuring flow of a fluid or flow of a fluent solid material in suspension in another fluid
Devices for measuring mass flow of a fluid or a fluent solid material
Direct mass flowmeters
operating by measuring pressure, force, momentum, or frequency of a fluid flow to which a rotational movement has been imparted
using a driven wheel as impeller and one or more other wheels or moving elements which are angularly restrained by a resilient member, e.g. spring member, as the measuring device
Coriolis or gyroscopic mass flowmeters
Indirect mass flowmeters, e.g. measuring volume flow and density, temperature, or pressure
with differential-pressure measurement to determine the volume flow
with positive-displacement meter or turbine meter to determine the volume flow

title.ko: 유체가 연속적이고 다소 고립된 양으로 계량기를 통과하는 유체 또는 유동성 고체 물질의 체적 유량을 측정하는 것, 계량기는 유량에 의해 구동되는 것 (체적 유량의 비율을 측정하는 것 G01F5/00)
title.en: Measuring the volume flow of fluids or fluent solid material wherein the fluid passes through the meter in successive and more or less isolated quantities, the meter being driven by the flow (measuring a proportion of the volume flow G01F0005000000)
with measuring chambers which expand or contract during measurement
having rigid movable walls
comprising members rotating in a fluid-tight or substantially fluid-tight manner in a housing
Rotary-piston or ring-piston meters
Geared or lobed impeller meters
Meters with nutating members, e.g. discs
comprising reciprocating pistons, e.g. reciprocating in a rotating body
in stationary cylinders
involving two or more cylinders
having flexible movable walls, e.g. diaphragms, bellows
for gases

title.ko: 작동중 움직이는 측정실을 가진 것(습식 가스메타 G01F 3/30)
title.en: with measuring chambers moved during operation (wet gas-meters G01F0003300000)
Tilting-trap meters
on carriers rotated by the weight of the liquid in the measuring chambers
Wet gas-meters
comprising partitioned drums rotating or nutating in a liquid
comprising bells reciprocating in a liquid

title.ko: 측정중에 일정체적을 가지며 정지한 측정실을 가진 것(측정중에 팽창 또는 수축하는 측정실을 가진 것 G01F 3/02)
title.en: with stationary measuring chambers having constant volume during measurement (with measuring chambers which expand or contract during measurement G01F0003020000)
having only one measuring chamber
Measuring a proportion of the volume flow
Volume-flow measuring devices with two or more measuring ranges; Compound meters
Measuring volume flow relative to another variable, e.g. of liquid fuel for an engine
wherein the other variable is the speed of a vehicle

title.ko: 중량에 관계없이 공급물 또는 용기로부터 유체 또는 유동성 고체의 정해진 체적을 측정하고 분리하고 반출하기 위해 각각 반복되고 동일한 조작하는데 적합한 외적 조작을 필요로 하는 장치
title.en: Metering by volume

title.ko: 중량에 관계없이 공급물 또는 용기로부터 유체 또는 유동성 고체의 정해진 체적을 측정하고 분리하고 반출하기 위해 각각 반복되고 동일한 조작하는데 적합한 외적 조작을 필요로 하는 장치
title.en: Apparatus requiring external operation adapted at each repeated and identical operation to measure and separate a predetermined volume of fluid or fluent solid material from a supply or container, without regard to weight, and to deliver it
with measuring chambers which expand or contract during measurement
of the free-piston type
with provision for varying the stroke of the piston
of the diaphragm or bellows type
with measuring chambers moved during operation

title.ko: 밸브형의 것, 즉. 유체 기밀하거나 분체 기밀한 운동에 의해 영향받는 분리(공급용기의 기울이거나 뒤집는 것을 포함한 것 G01F 11/26)
title.en: of the valve type, i.e. the separating being effected by fluid-tight or powder-tight movements (involving the tilting or inverting of the supply vessel G01F0011260000)
wherein the measuring chamber reciprocates
for liquid or semiliquid
for fluent solid material
wherein the measuring chamber rotates or oscillates
for liquid or semiliquid
for fluent solid material
wherein the measuring chamber is filled and emptied by tilting or inverting the supply vessel, e.g. bottle-emptying apparatus
with stationary measuring chambers having constant volume during measurement
with supply and discharge valves of the lift or plug-lift type
for liquid or semiliquid
for fluent solid material
with supply or discharge valves of the rectilinearly-moved slide type
for liquid or semiliquid
for fluent or solid material
with supply or discharge valves of the rotary or oscillatory type
for liquid or semiliquid
for fluent solid material
Apparatus for measuring by volume and delivering fluids or fluent solid materials, not provided for in the preceding groups

title.ko: 세부 또는 부속물이 이와 같은 장치의 특수한 형태에 적합하지 않은 한에 있어서 그룹 G01F 1/00부터 3/00의 장치의 세부 또는 부속물
title.en: Details of, or accessories for, apparatus of groups G01F0001000000-G01F0013000000 insofar as such details or appliances are not adapted to particular types of such apparatus
Compensating or correcting for variations in pressure, density, or temperature
of gases to be measured
Indicating or recording devices
for remote indication
using electrical means
Integration to give total flow, e.g. using mechanically-operated integrating mechanism
using electrically-operated integrating means
Air or gas separators in combination with liquid meters; Liquid separators in combination with gas-meters
Preventing damage by freezing or excess pressure or insufficient pressure
Cleaning arrangements; Filters
Casings, e.g. of special material
Diaphragms; Bellows; Mountings therefor
Supports or connecting means for meters

title.ko: 용기 또는 공중체(空中體)의 용적측정 또는 고체의 체적의 측정(체적을 측정하기 위해 길이 치수를 측정하는 것 G01B)
title.en: Measuring volume

title.ko: 용기 또는 공중체(空中體)의 용적측정 또는 고체의 체적의 측정(체적을 측정하기 위해 길이 치수를 측정하는 것 G01B)
title.en: Methods or apparatus for determining the capacity of containers or cavities, or the volume of solid bodies (measuring linear dimensions to determine volume G01B)
Calibrated capacity measures for fluids or fluent solid material, e.g. measuring cups
Methods or apparatus for measuring volume of fluids or fluent solid material, not otherwise provided for
involving measurement of pressure

title.ko: 액체 또는 유동성 고체의 레벨의 지시 또는 측정, 예. 부피에 관한 지시, 경보를 이용한 지시
title.en: Level indicators

title.ko: 액체 또는 유동성 고체의 레벨의 지시 또는 측정, 예. 부피에 관한 지시, 경보를 이용한 지시
title.en: Indicating or measuring liquid level or level of fluent solid material, e.g. indicating in terms of volume or indicating by means of an alarm

by gauge glasses or other apparatus involving a window or transparent tube for directly observing the level to be measured or the level of a liquid column in free communication with the main body of the liquid
by dip members, e.g. dip-sticks
by measurement of pressure
Indicating, recording, or alarm devices being actuated by mechanical or fluid means, e.g. using gas, mercury, or a diaphragm as transmitting element, or by a column of liquid
Indicating, recording, or alarm devices actuated electrically
by measurement of weight, e.g. to determine the level of stored liquefied gas

title.ko: 측정될 레벨(levels)에 근거한, 선형 치수, 압력 또는 무게를 제외한 물리적 변화량 측정에 의한 것, 예. 증기 또는 물의 열전달 차이에 의한(부유물의 이용을 포함한 것 G01F23/30)
title.en: by measuring physical variables, other than linear dimensions, pressure or weight, dependent on the level to be measured, e.g. by difference of heat transfer of steam or water (involving the use of floats G01F0023300000)
by measuring variations of resistance of resistors due to contact with conductor fluid
by measuring variations of capacity or inductance of capacitors or inductors arising from the presence of liquid or fluent solid material in the electric or electromagnetic fields
by measuring variations in capacitance of capacitors
by measuring the variations of parameters of electromagnetic or acoustic waves applied directly to the liquid or fluent solid material
Electromagnetic waves
X-rays; Gamma rays
Light
Acoustic waves
Measuring transit time of reflected waves
Measuring attenuation of transmitted waves

using rotatable arms or other pivotable transmission elements
using mechanically actuated indicating means
using electrically actuated indicating means
using magnetically actuated indicating means
using bands or wires as transmission elements
using mechanically actuated indicating means
using electrically actuated indicating means
using magnetically actuated indicating means
using twisted spindles as transmission elements
using mechanically actuated indicating means
using electrically actuated indicating means
using magnetically actuated indicating means
using elements rigidly fixed to, and rectilinearly moving with, the floats as transmission elements
using mechanically actuated indicating means
using electrically actuated indicating means
using magnetically actuated indicating means
of the free float type
using mechanically actuated indicating means
using electrically actuated indicating means
for sensing changes in level only at discrete points
using magnetically actuated indicating means
for sensing changes in level only at discrete points
characterised by the construction of the float
Arrangements for signal processing
Testing or calibration of apparatus for measuring volume, volume flow or liquid level or for metering by volume
